news.t: First Trust Launches First Trust Nasdaq Lux Digital Health Solutions ETF

holdings.infoBox: EKG is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are DexCom stock at 8.06%, IQVIA Holdings at 7.93%, Veeva Systems at 7.06%, Intuitive Surgical at 6.64%, and ResMed at 6.04%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Lux Digital Health Solutions ETF (EKG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ Lux Health Tech index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of globally-listed companies engaged in digital health technologies. EKG was launched on Mar 22, 2022 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust Nasdaq Lux Digital Health Solutions ETF
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First ...
